perturbation.original_text: 3. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed and enforced in accordance local laws of the State of Florida applicable to agreements made and to be performed within the State, without regard to conflict of laws principles thereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed and enforced in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida applicable to agreements made and to be performed within the State, without regard to conflict of laws principles thereof. However, disputes regarding intellectual property rights shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
perturbation.explanation: The modification to section 3 creates an in-text contradiction by stating that while the agreement is generally governed by Florida law, disputes regarding intellectual property rights are governed by Delaware law. This creates uncertainty about which state's laws apply to different aspects of the agreement, potentially leading to disputes about jurisdiction and legal interpretation. This directly contradicts the initial statement that Florida law applies to the entire agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. This Agreement shall be governed by and construed and enforced in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida applicable to agreements made and to be performed within the State, without regard to conflict of laws principles thereof. However, disputes regarding intellectual property rights shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies section 3 to state that the agreement is governed by Florida law, except for intellectual property disputes, which are governed by Delaware law. The contradicted text (which is identical to the changed text) highlights this very in-text contradiction. The original text stated that Florida law governs the entire agreement. Therefore, the change introduces a direct contradiction by creating an exception to the governing law.

perturbation.original_text: 5. No waiver of any provisions hereof shall be valid unless it is in writing signed by the person against whom it is charged. No waiver of any provision herein shall constitute a waiver of any other provision hereof, or of the provision at any other time.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. No waiver of any provisions hereof shall be valid unless it is in writing signed by the person against whom it is charged. Notwithstanding the foregoing, a verbal agreement to waive a provision shall be valid if confirmed by email within 24 hours. No waiver of any provision herein shall constitute a waiver of any other provision hereof, or of the provision at any other time.
perturbation.explanation: The added sentence introduces an in-text contradiction within section 5. The first sentence mandates that waivers must be in writing and signed. However, the added sentence allows for verbal waivers confirmed by email, directly contradicting the written requirement. This introduces ambiguity and potential disputes about the validity of waivers.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. No waiver of any provisions hereof shall be valid unless it is in writing signed by the person against whom it is charged. Notwithstanding the foregoing, a verbal agreement to waive a provision shall be valid if confirmed by email within 24 hours. No waiver of any provision herein shall constitute a waiver of any other provision hereof, or of the provision at any other time.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction within section 5 itself. The original text states that 'No waiver of any provisions hereof shall be valid unless it is in writing signed by the person against whom it is charged.' The added sentence, 'Notwithstanding the foregoing, a verbal agreement to waive a provision shall be valid if confirmed by email within 24 hours,' directly contradicts the written requirement, as it allows for a verbal waiver to be valid under certain conditions, creating an inconsistency within the same section. The Changed and Contradicted Text are the same location.

perturbation.original_text: 6. This is an agreement between separate legal entities and neither is the agent or employee of the other for any purpose whatsoever. The parties do not intend to create a partnership or joint venture between themselves. Neither party shall have the right to bind the other to any agreement with a third party or to inure any obligation or liabilities on behalf of the other party.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. This is an agreement between separate legal entities and neither is the agent or employee of the other for any purpose whatsoever, except that Flow Capital Advisors, Inc. shall act as JAG Media Holdings, Inc.'s agent for the purpose of introducing potential investors. The parties do not intend to create a partnership or joint venture between themselves. Neither party shall have the right to bind the other to any agreement with a third party or to inure any obligation or liabilities on behalf of the other party.
perturbation.explanation: The change in section 6 contradicts the original statement that "neither is the agent or employee of the other for any purpose whatsoever." By explicitly stating that Flow Capital Advisors, Inc. acts as JAG Media Holdings, Inc.'s agent for introducing investors, it creates an in-text contradiction. This affects the interpretation of the entire section and potentially other sections related to liability and obligations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. This is an agreement between separate legal entities and neither is the agent or employee of the other for any purpose whatsoever, except that Flow Capital Advisors, Inc. shall act as JAG Media Holdings, Inc.'s agent for the purpose of introducing potential investors. The parties do not intend to create a partnership or joint venture between themselves. Neither party shall have the right to bind the other to any agreement with a third party or to inure any obligation or liabilities on behalf of the other party.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that neither party is the agent or employee of the other 'for any purpose whatsoever.' The changed text modifies this statement by creating an exception: Flow Capital Advisors, Inc. acts as JAG Media Holdings, Inc.'s agent for introducing potential investors. This directly contradicts the initial 'for any purpose whatsoever' clause, creating a clear in-text contradiction. The contradicted text is the same as the changed text which illustrates the contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 7. This Agreement contains the whole agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and there are no collateral or precedent representation, agreements or conditions not specifically set forth herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 7. This Agreement contains the whole agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and there are no collateral or precedent representation, agreements or conditions not specifically set forth herein. However, a side letter agreement regarding commission fees, dated concurrently with this agreement, shall also be considered part of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The modification to section 7 adds an in-text contradiction. The first sentence declares that the agreement contains the *entire* agreement, disallowing collateral agreements. The added sentence then introduces a side letter agreement regarding commission fees as *also* being part of the agreement. This directly contradicts the 'whole agreement' clause and creates uncertainty as to which documents constitute the complete agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. This Agreement contains the whole agreement between the parties concerning the subject matter hereof and there are no collateral or precedent representation, agreements or conditions not specifically set forth herein. However, a side letter agreement regarding commission fees, dated concurrently with this agreement, shall also be considered part of this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies section 7, which initially stated the agreement contains the whole agreement between the parties and there are no collateral agreements. The changed text then introduces a side letter agreement, contradicting the initial statement and creating an in-text contradiction. The contradicted text is exactly the same as the changed text; thus, the contradiction exists.

perturbation.original_text: 8. Any modification or amendment of any provisions of this Agreement must be in writing, signed by the parties hereof and dated subsequent to the date hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. Any modification or amendment of any provisions of this Agreement must be in writing, signed by the parties hereof and dated subsequent to the date hereof. Email exchanges between authorized representatives confirming an amendment shall also be considered valid, superseding the written requirement.
perturbation.explanation: The amendment to section 8 introduces an in-text contradiction. The first sentence mandates written and signed modifications. The added sentence allows for email exchanges to serve as valid amendments, contradicting the requirement for a written and signed document. This ambiguity creates uncertainty about the proper procedure for amending the agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8. Any modification or amendment of any provisions of this Agreement must be in writing, signed by the parties hereof and dated subsequent to the date hereof. Email exchanges between authorized representatives confirming an amendment shall also be considered valid, superseding the written requirement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds a sentence that allows email exchanges to supersede the written requirement for modifications to the agreement. This directly contradicts the original requirement, also found in the contradicted text, that any modification must be in writing and signed by the parties. The amendment introduces an exception, which causes a contradiction because it provides two potentially conflicting ways to amend the agreement, thus creating an inconsistency as per the provided definition.
